part.text:
# Resolve Conflicts with Built-in Tools

## Background
Jujutsu (`jj`) supports resolving conflicts using external merge tools or built-in tools. The built-in merge tools `:ours` and `:theirs` can be used to choose side #1 and side #2 of the conflict respectively.

## Requirements
- Resolve the conflict in `file1.txt` by choosing side #1 (`:ours`).
- Resolve the conflict in `file2.txt` by choosing side #2 (`:theirs`).

## Constraints
- Project path: `/home/user/myproject`

<system-reminder># System Information

Operating System: linux
Default Shell: 
Home Directory: /root
Current Working Directory: /
Current Time: Sun Apr 19 2026 17:07:03 GMT+0000 (Coordinated Universal Time)

# GIT STATUS
Current branch: 
Main branch (you will usually use this for PRs): 

Recent commits:


# TODOs
No TODOs yet, if you are working on tasks that would benefit from a todo list please use the todoWrite tool to create one.</system-reminder>

# Resolve Conflicts with Built-in Tools

## Background
Jujutsu (`jj`) supports resolving conflicts using external merge tools or built-in tools. The built-in merge tools `:ours` and `:theirs` can be used to choose side #1 and side #2 of the conflict respectively.

## Requirements
- Resolve the conflict in `file1.txt` by choosing side #1 (`:ours`).
- Resolve the conflict in `file2.txt` by choosing side #2 (`:theirs`).

## Constraints
- Project path: `/home/user/myproject`
